slices.purpose: Safely reduce animation/frame pressure via performance mode and motion throttle controls.
slices.expected_impact: Immediate uplift to frame stability and 1% low FPS with minimal visual regression risk.
slices.risk: Fake toggle risk if controls do not actually reduce active animations/timers.
pass_criteria: Performance mode reduces active animation density measurably.
Route/API truth remains intact (200, assets loaded, API checks pass).
Average FPS and 1% low FPS move upward vs baseline.
slices.rollback_condition: If UI truth overlays or click/state behavior break, revert throttle hooks immediately.
evidence_required: Truth overlay and API pass evidence

slices.purpose: Reduce heavy shadows/filters/gradients/keyframe cost while preserving visual identity.
slices.expected_impact: Lower paint/compositor cost and improved smoothness under interaction.
slices.risk: Visual identity can degrade if effects are removed indiscriminately.
pass_criteria: High-cost effect density reduced with style identity preserved.
No collapse of semantic zone readability or hierarchy.
FPS metrics improve or at minimum do not regress after Slice 1 gains.
slices.rollback_condition: If visual identity collapses or readability worsens materially, restore prior effect set.

slices.purpose: Reduce main-thread pressure from timers, rAF loops, innerHTML churn, and frequent DOM append patterns.
slices.expected_impact: Better 1% low FPS, reduced frame spikes, steadier interaction latency.
slices.risk: State synchronization or click behavior can break if update batching is incorrect.
pass_criteria: DOM update frequency reduced without loss of truth data fidelity.
slices.rollback_condition: If any interaction/state regression appears, roll back batching changes immediately.

slices.purpose: Future architecture split: cinematic static layer + thin live truth overlay layer.
slices.expected_impact: Long-term stability of FPS with preserved aesthetic richness.
slices.risk: Overengineering risk if introduced before slices 1-3 stabilize baseline.
pass_criteria: Live truth overlay remains complete and responsive.
Cinematic layer cost bounded independently from live telemetry updates.
FPS acceptance sustained across repeated runs.
slices.rollback_condition: If layering breaks truth observability or increases complexity without gains, defer LOD architecture.
